mapper.select: select a.*, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM yw_article_upvote b WHERE b.article_id = a.id and b.member_id=#{memberId}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as upvote_flag from yw_article a where a.id=#{id}
select a.* from yw_article a inner join yw_auth_product b on a.spu_id=b.id where b.member_id=#{memberId} order by a.create_time desc
